meaning: n.方舟,约柜,箱子 (Ark)n. <圣经>方舟
examples: He selects Noah due to his righteousness and he issues a direct command to build an ark.
It's some kind of gold cover and then there were two cherubim, these enormous winged lions that flanked the ark.
When Noah and his family stepped off the ark, they spoke a single language that was passed on to their offspring.
So why are animal rights protesters staging demonstrations outside its Little Rock, Ark. headquarters?
ARK, a charity set up by a hedge-fund dealer, will join it in 2008.
